extractedSignals.title: Group Fitness Classes & Heart Rate-Based Interval Training
sourceText: As many classes as you want.
Build the strength you need to keep up with your busy summer of fun.
Get your first month of unlimited classes for just $99 with purchase of a performance monitor.⁺⁺ Terms apply.
The workout that works out well.
In weeks, most members notice the shift: more energy, a better mood, and real momentum.
On average, members lose 8.6% body fat and gain 2.6% lean muscle from 18 classes in just 8 weeks.
1 That kind of progress is why millions of members across 1,500 studios worldwide have chosen Orangetheory to achieve their fitness goals.
Not your thing after 30 days?
No sweat—we’ll refund your money.
You don’t need to be fit to get started.
Just show up—we’ve got you.
With expert coaching and OTconnect™ technology, every workout adjusts to your fitness level and your goals.
Whether you’re easing in or pushing hard, we meet you with encouragement and support—not pressure.
Every step forward builds a body—and mindset—that’s stronger than yesterday.
Learn more about the workout.
The workout that works for people like you.
OTF has really kept me on track as part of my daily routine.
It's one of the best decisions I have made for myself.
Nicole P OTF Waterford My initial goal was to get moving and increase my energy levels.
In the process, I have lost over 20 pounds, lost inches, built muscles, and feel stronger than ever!
Max D OTF Royal Palm Beach Start your fitness journey today.
Valid at participating studios only.
See studios for details.
Recommended retail price of a casual visit is $35; however, prices do vary, as each studio is individually owned and operated.
Offer may be subject to satisfactory completion of pre-exercise screening and/or standard temporary/guest membership terms.
Restrictions may apply; inquire at local studio for additional information.
† Offer limited to Premier members who complete 12 sessions within a month of membership start date.
All sessions must be at the member’s home studio.
Member must notify their home studio within 30 days of membership start date to initiate cancellation and receive refund of membership dues.
OTBeat® sales are not refundable.
Restrictions may apply; inquire at local studio for additional information.
Former members must not have had an active membership or package for sixty (60) days prior to rejoin date.
Participating studios only.
Additional restrictions may apply, inquire at local studio for more information.
** Valid for non-members only.
All classes taken during the Five Day Paid Trial period may only be taken at the studio location where the Five Day Paid Trial was purchased.
Once a Five Day Paid Trial is purchased, the five-day timeframe is initiated.
Valid for one time purchase only.
Offer available at participating studios only.
Other terms apply, see studio for full details.
Pay $99 for your first month of a Premier membership.
Performance Monitor purchase required.
For complete terms and conditions go to http://orangetheory.com/promotion-terms or visit studio for more details.
We also share information about your use of our site with our social media, advertising and analytics partners.
You can exercise your rights to opt-out of sale of processing personal data for targeted advertising by clicking the link on the right.
Click on the different category headings to find out more and change our default settings according to your preference.
You may exercise your rights by using the toggles below.
If you opt out, the ads and content that you see may not be as relevant to you.
They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site.
They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.
They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device.

designIntent.summary: Referencia de treino energetico com cor proprietaria, metricas, prova de resultado e CTA trial.
designIntent.hero: Energia mensuravel: treino, zonas e resultado.
designIntent.nonGoal: Nao e DS final do cliente; nao contem fluxo real de formulario.

gradients.name: Metric Glow
gradients.value: radial-gradient(circle at 18% 22%, rgba(241,90,36,.35), transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at 78% 72%, rgba(39,128,168,.22), transparent 38%)

semantic.contrastIntent: AA minimum for body text; generated preview overrides --c2 as light surface and --c3 as dark text to avoid low-contrast sections.

contextualUsageRules.text: Usar token semantico com contraste AA.
contextualUsageRules.background: Usar surface/background conforme personalidade do site.

fontFamilies.loading: local when available; fallback stack otherwise

icons.rule: icone nao desloca layout no hover

risks: Laranja em fundo branco precisa peso alto.
Metricas nao podem parecer dashboard frio.
Motion de pulso deve parar em reduced-motion.

rules: Hero full viewport com metricas e foto ativa.
Menu deve destacar treino, ciencia, estudios e trial.
Componentes usam zonas e progresso como linguagem.

menuSystem.note: Menu metrico: foco em prova, resultado e trial.
menuSystem.behavior: overlay flyout, Esc closes, link closes

referenceUsage.purpose: Insumo de fitness com ciencia e calor. O DS final escolhe quais metricas reais usar.
nonGoals: nao criar DS final do cliente
nao usar padrao generico para todos os sites
differentiationRules: Hero full viewport com metricas e foto ativa.
Menu deve destacar treino, ciencia, estudios e trial.
Componentes usam zonas e progresso como linguagem.
referenceUsage.qualityRule: Preview precisa demonstrar personalidade do site extraido, com menu completo, hero, tokens, gradientes, tipo, efeitos, componentes, cards/secoes, story parallax, icones, handoff e motion linkados.

globalTokens.radius: 0-10px conforme referencia; cards ate 8px salvo marcas arredondadas
